message:
feat(tui): add inline mode with scrollback preservation (2noh9.4.1)

Add --inline, --ui-height, and --anchor CLI flags to cass tui.
When --inline is set, the TUI uses ftui's inline renderer instead
of alt-screen mode, keeping terminal scrollback intact.

- InlineTuiConfig struct holds ui_height and anchor settings
- run_tui_ftui() accepts Optional<InlineTuiConfig>
- PTY e2e test verifies no alt-screen escape sequence is emitted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
